steps.title: Complete the verb phrase
steps.content: After "need," the sentence calls for an infinitive verb phrase: reindeer rest when they need to do something. Here, the thing they need is to digest their food.

steps.title: Reject ungrammatical forms
steps.content:
• Choice A omits the required "to" after "need."
  • Choice B uses a future-tense verb where an infinitive is needed.
  • Choice D uses a gerund, which is not idiomatic after "need" in this sentence.
The remaining choice completes the phrase "need to digest." The answer is C.
